title: woodsia cycloloba
intro: Woodsia cycloloba, also known as the Northern Lady fern or Woodsia fern, is a species of fern in the genus Woodsia and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Woodsia cycloloba include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
